title: Entry-Level Radiologist at Aravind Eye Hospital

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Radiologist at Aravind Eye Hospital
jsonLd.description:
Aravind Eye Hospital, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Radiologist for our Allahabad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Aravind Eye Hospital:
Aravind Eye Hospital is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Aravind Eye Hospital!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
